scripts.typecheck: npm -w packages/contracts run build && npm -w packages/contracts run typecheck && npm -w packages/test-fixtures run typecheck && npm -w apps/api run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck && npm -w apps/e2e run typecheck
scripts.test: npm -w packages/contracts run build && npm -w packages/contracts test && npm -w apps/api test
scripts.build: npm -w packages/contracts run build && npm -w packages/test-fixtures run build && npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/web run build
